component.name: spring-boot-starter-actuator
component.description: Starter for using Spring Boot's Actuator which provides production ready features to help you monitor and manage your application

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

component.name: jackson-datatype-jsr310
component.description: Add-on module to support JSR-310 (Java 8 Date & Time API) data types.

component.name: micrometer-registry-prometheus
component.description: MeterRegistry implementation for Prometheus using io.prometheus:prometheus-metrics-core. If you have compatibility issues with this module, you can go back to io.micrometer:micrometer-registry-prometheus-simpleclient that uses io.prometheus:simpleclient_common.

component.name: micrometer-core
component.description: Core module of Micrometer containing instrumentation API and implementation

component.name: HdrHistogram
component.description: HdrHistogram supports the recording and analyzing sampled data value counts across a configurable integer value range with configurable value precision within the range. Value precision is expressed as the number of significant digits in the value recording, and provides control over value quantization behavior across the value range and the subsequent value resolution at any given level.

component.name: LatencyUtils
component.description: LatencyUtils is a package that provides latency recording and reporting utilities.

component.name: prometheus-metrics-model
component.description: Data model for read-only immutable Prometheus metrics snapshots.

component.name: prometheus-metrics-config
component.description: Configuration for Prometheus metrics and exposition formats.

component.name: prometheus-metrics-tracer-common
component.description: Common Module for Prometheus integrations with distributed tracing libraries.

component.name: spring-boot-starter
component.description: Core starter, including auto-configuration support, logging and YAML

component.name: snakeyaml
component.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

component.name: spring-boot-starter-logging
component.description: Starter for logging using Logback. Default logging starter

component.name: log4j-to-slf4j
component.description: Forwards the Log4j API calls to SLF4J. (Refer to the `log4j-slf4j[2]-impl` artifacts for forwarding SLF4J to the Log4j API.)

component.name: log4j-api
component.description: The logging API of the Log4j project. Library and application code can log through this API. It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases. Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.

component.name: spring-boot-starter-web
component.description: Starter for building web, including RESTful, applications using Spring MVC. Uses Tomcat as the default embedded container

component.name: spring-boot-starter-json
component.description: Starter for reading and writing json

component.name: jackson-datatype-jdk8
component.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support JDK 8 data types.

component.name: jackson-module-parameter-names
component.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support introspection of method/constructor parameter names, without having to add explicit property name annotation.

component.name: spring-boot-starter-tomcat
component.description: Starter for using Tomcat as the embedded servlet container. Default servlet container starter used by spring-boot-starter-web
